name: beginnersinai-skills
description: Free Claude skills and plugins by Beginners in AI. Research-backed, tested on real businesses.

plugins.name: ai-mapping
plugins.description: Find where AI should be in your business but isn't. Scans 10 core functions, scores opportunities, generates an action plan. Based on Harvard/INSEAD research (515 startups, 44% more AI use cases, 1.9x higher revenue).
